policy: Curated promotion manifest for full_site pages that have been upgraded from bilingual_draft to bilingual_complete after paragraph-level bilingual coverage and draft-marker removal.

promotions.reason: Core Sdf class page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage, draft marker removal, and retained API/source terminology.
Core Usd class page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for composed prim semantics, property and composition APIs, lifetime, traversal, applied API schemas, and instancing.

Core Sdf path value page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for storage-key semantics, namespace identity, absolute and relative paths, path syntax, construction helpers, thread-safety, and composition debugging.

Core UsdGeom mesh schema page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for point-based primitive semantics, topology arrays, subdivision properties, creases/corners/holes, interpolation, primvars, and schema-wrapper usage.

Core Tf token page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for registered-string handles, bounded fixed-symbol usage, token registry behavior, lookup without creation, hashing containers, empty-token semantics, and OpenUSD schema-name usage.

Core Usd stage-cache page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for strongly concurrency safe stage sharing, UsdStageCacheContext and UsdStage::Open usage, matching and lookup APIs, erase/clear lifetime boundaries, resolver-context matching, and cache-vs-layer/resolver boundaries.

Core Usd attribute-limits page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for limits dictionary metadata, sub-dictionary keys, minimum/maximum storage, soft/hard limits, authored-vs-fallback semantics, clear operations, and UsdAttribute metadata boundaries.

Core Usd validation error page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for structured validation results, validator provenance, identifier/name/type/sites/message/data fields, fixer lookup APIs, no-error state, comparison semantics, and common validation-reporting misreads.

Core UsdGeom basis-curves page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for batched curve representation, curveVertexCounts layout, type/basis/wrap semantics, segment indexing, interpolation data sizing, Create*Attr authoring boundaries, and tubes/ribbons rendering interpretation.

Core UsdPhysics joint page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for rigid-body joint constraints, body relationship targets, local joint frames, default D6 semantics, enabled/collision/break attributes, articulation exclusion, Create-vs-Get authoring boundaries, and runtime solver responsibility.

Core UsdImaging delegate page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for USD scene graph to Hydra translation, HdSceneDelegate/HdRenderIndex query boundaries, ApplyPendingUpdates synchronization, cache/index path conversion, topology and primvar queries, purpose filtering, time sampling, adapter boundaries, and common imaging-debugging misreads.

Core Sdr shader property page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for shader-node property interfaces, input/output name and type semantics, default value and Sdf type conversion, array/tuple shape metadata, UI hints/options/page/shown-if fields, deprecated SdrTokenMap metadata versus SdrShaderPropertyMetadata, CanConnectTo connection compatibility, implementation-name diagnostics, and boundaries with SdrShaderNode and SdfValueTypeName.

Core Vt value-reference page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for non-owning type-erased value views, VtValue interoperability, lifetime constraints, typed access and runtime type diagnostics, array element/type shape queries, hash/compose/transform capability checks, implementation helpers, and common misuse around temporaries and long-lived storage.

Core Vdf graph-node page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for VdfNetwork node topology, input/output specs, named ports, dependency masks and required input requests, VdfNode versus VdfContext boundaries, protected graph-maintenance hooks, connection-change diagnostics, network identity, OpenExec layering, and common misreads around values versus graph structure.

Core Vdf computation-context page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for callback parameter-bundle semantics, VdfContext versus VdfNode boundaries, input value availability, demand-driven output requests, SetOutput/SetEmptyOutput/SetOutputToReferenceInput behavior, diagnostics with node debug names, VdfEvaluationState and accessor layering, and common misreads around persistent state versus active callback context.

Core Vdf read/write accessor template page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for random access to Vdf output data, non-owning accessor boundaries, static element type T, operator[] access, GetSize and IsEmpty interpretation, request/mask/evaluation lifetime constraints, VdfContext/VdfOutput/executor layering, iterator versus accessor access patterns, and common misuse around persistence and semantic type conversion.

Core Vdf grapher-options page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for VdfGrapher output configuration, graph visualization versus evaluation boundaries, NodeFilterCallback/NodeStyleCallback/NodeLimitVector roles, DisplayStyle and annotation/color styling, node selection and DebugNameFilter scope, mask and affects-mask visualization, page layout and noise-control options, related VdfGrapher/VdfNode/VdfConnectionVector/TfToken boundaries, and common misuse around treating graph dumps as execution or profiling evidence.

Core Esf property-interface page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for scene adapter property abstraction, read-only UsdProperty-like boundaries, exec network compiler calls, EsfJournal recompilation-condition tracking, GetBaseName and GetNamespace naming semantics, abstract adapter query contracts, related EsfObjectInterface/EsfPrim/EsfAttribute/EsfRelationship/SdfPath/TfToken/VtValue/TfType/UsdProperty layering, and common misuse around writable property wrappers or ignoring journaling.

Core Trace event-data page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for TraceEvent payload storage, typed tagged value semantics, TraceEvent::DataType dispatch, constructor overload meaning, GetBool/GetInt/GetUInt/GetFloat/GetString access rules, WriteJson and JsWriter serialization boundaries, trace report representation, and common misuse around treating payload data as the whole event or calling getters without checking type.

Core Ef lofted-output-set page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for EfPageCacheBasedExecutor lofted output tracking, page-cache sourced VdfOutput values, VdfMask-scoped membership, Add/Remove/Clear/Resize/GetSize collection lifecycle, CollectLoftedDependencies dependency gathering, RemoveAllOutputsForNode invalidation cleanup, VdfNetwork/VdfNode/VdfId boundaries, and common misuse around treating lofted outputs as USD layer or rendering outputs.

Core Tf Python lock page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for Python Global Interpreter Lock management, Python thread state boundaries, Python/C++ execution context, Acquire/Release direct GIL operations, BeginAllowThreads/EndAllowThreads long-running C++ work pattern, TfPyLock RAII lifecycle, State Valid Transitions debugging, TfPyEnsureGILUnlockedObj related RAII protocol, and common misuse around treating the GIL as a USD object lock or skipping paired state restoration.

Core Hydra data-source locator page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for HdDataSourceLocator as a short TfToken token-path key, Hydra scene index and data source namespace boundaries, constructor overloads, Append/Prepend path composition, token element access, HasPrefix/GetCommonPrefix/Intersects dirty and invalidation range checks, EmptyLocator/IsEmpty broad invalidation semantics, comparison/hash behavior, and common misuse around treating locators as SdfPath, filesystem paths, or string-only keys.

Core Pcp property-index page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for PcpPropertyIndex as a property-level composition index of scene-description opinion sites, boundaries versus PcpPrimIndex, SdfPropertySpec, and resolved values, constructor semantics, GetPropertyRange and PcpPropertyIterator traversal, GetNumLocalSpecs local contribution counts, GetLocalErrors diagnostics, IsEmpty interpretation, Swap container-state behavior, and common misuse around editing specs, counting all opinions, or treating empty indexes as resolved values.

Core Pcp composition-arc page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for PcpArc as a prim-index graph edge, source node and target parent-node direction, PcpArcType meaning, parent/origin/siblingNumAtOrigin diagnostics, mapToParent PcpMapExpression namespace mapping, namespaceDepth bookkeeping, constructor semantics, boundaries versus authored USD references/payloads/inherits, UsdPrim namespace parenting, and common misuse around treating arcs as editable authored data or plain string paths.

Core Pcp unresolved-prim-path error page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for PcpErrorUnresolvedPrimPath as a structured Pcp composition and asset-resolution error, resolved versus loaded stages, PcpErrorBase inheritance, PcpSite site location, SdfPath unresolvedPath, sourceLayer and targetLayer diagnostics, PcpArcType arcType-specific triage, New and ToString boundaries, and common misuse around treating unresolvedPath as a filesystem path or relying only on string diagnostics.

Core Hydra scene-delegate page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for HdSceneDelegate as Hydra's abstract scene-data query interface, boundaries versus UsdImagingDelegate, HdRenderIndex, render primitives, instancers, materials, tasks, scene-index/data-source architecture, SdfPath identity semantics, transform/extent/visibility/purpose/material/instancer/primvar/topology query responsibilities, dirty/sync boundary, time-sampling/value-lifetime cautions, and common misuse around authoring USD, bypassing dirty bits, or treating delegate paths as one-to-one USD prim paths.

Core Hydra render-buffer page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for HdRenderBuffer as a Hydra render buffer bprim and data-resource handle, indexed versus out-of-band creation, HdSceneDelegate and SdfPath synchronization boundaries, allocation parameters, dimensions, HdFormat, AOV/render-target usage, Map/Unmap CPU access protocol, Resolve and multi-sample behavior, dirty bits and Sync semantics, IsConverged reporting, GetResource backend-specific ownership, adjacent HdRenderPass/HdTask/HdRenderBufferDescriptor/HdAovDescriptor relationships, and common debugging paths for empty AOVs, stale readback, convergence, and resource lifetime issues.

Core Hydra task page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for HdTask as a Hydra render unit of work scheduled by HdEngine::Execute, boundaries versus USD prims, HdSceneDelegate, HdRenderIndex, and renderer backend objects, Sync/Prepare/Execute lifecycle semantics, dirty bits and GetInitialDirtyBitsMask, task context access via _GetTaskContextData/_HasTaskContextData/_GetTaskParams, GetRenderTags filtering boundaries, IsConverged scheduling semantics, _GetDriver integration boundary, derived Hdx task families, and common misuse around rendering during Sync, bypassing task order, or confusing render tags with USD purpose.

Core Storm render-pass state page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for HdStRenderPassState as the rendering-parameter object shared among render passes, its boundary with HdRenderPassState, HdRenderPass, HdCamera, Hgi, shader state, GL/Hgi pipeline descriptors, Prepare/Bind lifecycle, camera matrices, viewport/framing, clip planes, graphics pipeline hash, AOV multi-sample resolve behavior, inherited render-pass state members, and common debugging mistakes around treating render-state issues as USD authoring or composition problems.

Core Storm dispatch-buffer page upgraded with paragraph-level bilingual coverage for HdStDispatchBuffer as an unsigned-integer VBO used for indirect dispatch, its command layout for MultiDrawIndirect and DispatchComputeIndirect, BufferResourceView creation over interleaved uint-array subsets, HdBufferArray aggregation, HdResourceBinder binding methods and offsets, HdStResourceRegistry ownership, command stride/count diagnostics, Reallocate/CopyData/GarbageCollect lifecycle, resource accessors, DebugDump usage, and common mistakes around confusing backend dispatch resources with USD authored data or ordinary primvar buffers.
